title: FlamePack Re-Vulkanized
description: Get even higher performance with VulkanAPI
body:
This modpack uses the [Vulkan graphics API](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod), offering significantly better performance and smooth gameplay compared to the traditional OpenGL renderer. Thanks to modern management of graphic resources and more efficient use of multithreading, the pack significantly reduces lag, increases frames per second (FPS) and improves the game's responsiveness - especially on low-end and mid-range computers.

Additional advantages:

- Faster loading of worlds and chunks

- More stable work with shaders and advanced textures

- Better compatibility with modern graphics cards

**Ideal for players who want to squeeze the maximum performance from Minecraft without sacrificing graphic quality.**

![FlamePack Vulkan performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df6b906b12480abfb92d522b5efe1e61422db94e.jpeg)
